caption: A large, formal assembly hall with an ornate, patterned ceiling and tan walls is filled with a crowd of people seated in curved rows facing a central stage. The attendees are dressed in a variety of colorful attire, with many wearing traditional white garments. On the stage, a large, light-blue textured backdrop features a small emblem in the center. Two large screens flank the backdrop, displaying a live feed of the room. A single speaker stands behind a podium on the stage. Throughout the sequence, the scene remains static; the people in the audience remain seated, and the speaker remains in position behind the podium. There are no visible changes in movement, lighting, or on-screen text across the frames, capturing a moment of focused attention during a presentation or official meeting.
